summary: Pixel-art animation set to music with no speech. A blue-and-white 'ICE AIR' jetliner with a wreath on its tail flies and banks over a snow-covered nighttime village with lit buildings and falling snow. A title card with marquee-bulb lettering reads 'Merry Christmas from ICE'.

script.scene: Pixel-art 'ICE AIR' airliner climbs to the right over a snowy nighttime village, snowflakes falling; a red and green wreath on the tail fin.
The plane levels off lower across the frame as the lit village with churches and cottages scrolls beneath it amid falling snow.
Wide shot of the lit village under snowfall with evergreen trees in the foreground; the 'ICE AIR' jet descends toward the lower-left past the rooftops.
Title card: marquee-bulb lettering reads 'Merry Christmas from ICE' over the snowy village, with the small 'ICE AIR' plane above the text and snowflakes.
The 'ICE AIR' jetliner banks to the right against the dark snowy sky above the lit village.

notable_text: On-aircraft livery: 'ICE AIR'. Title card: 'Merry Christmas from ICE'. Tweet text: 'Merry Christmas, America!'
